course_correction_note.trigger: Three handler-local fixes failed because the payment-before-confirmation invariant spans two independently committed services without a shared transaction, durable outbox, or ordering coordinator.
evidence_refs: Handler retry failed when the order service recovered before PaymentAuthorized publication.
Consumer delay failed under a longer broker partition and introduced latency.
The in-memory flag failed after either service restarted.
OrderConfirmed can become visible before PaymentAuthorized during a broker partition.
preserved_constraints: Preserve backward compatibility for existing event consumers.
Preserve the current incident containment flag while the architecture is corrected.
Do not weaken the payment-before-confirmation invariant.
